title: Vault: per-connector scoping + OAuth refresh/rotation + JIT value redaction + audit log

implement.detail: scopedSecrets (fail-closed: no secret_scope => no secrets); OAuth grant storage + getAccessToken auto-refresh with per-connector in-flight lock + revoke + oauthHealth; src/lib/secret-redaction.ts (masks ALL known values, any length); src/lib/vault-audit.ts (append-only JSONL); spawn.ts stateful line-buffered redaction tee; vaultEnvForEntry scoped+audited

test.detail: tests/vault-scoping.test.ts (14): scoping, fail-closed, OAuth valid/refresh/concurrent-refresh-lock/revoke/health, redaction incl. short-value, audit, oauth-preserved-on-write; own-port-lifecycle(11) + vault-heal(18) updated to scoped contract. typecheck clean.
test.command: npm run typecheck && npx vitest run tests/vault-scoping.test.ts tests/vault.test.ts tests/own-port-lifecycle.test.ts tests/vault-heal.test.ts

codexReview.detail: R1 needs-attention 4 findings. AGREED+FIXED: F1 unscoped over-delivery -> fail-closed; F3 chunk-local redaction -> stateful line-buffered tee; F4 unsynchronized OAuth refresh -> per-connector in-flight lock. REBUTTED: F2 legacy real-passphrase migration (contradicts documented keychain-only decision F1; reconnect is the recovery). R2 confirmed F1/F3/F4 fixed, raised short-value redaction gap -> FIXED (mask all lengths) + test. Budget 2 rounds spent; all agreed findings fixed & tested.

codexPwTest.detail: no UI behavior; vault UI is C6, e2e sealing in Z1

walkthrough.detail: vault sealing story recorded in Z1 end-to-end proof
